hooks.command: $src = 'C:\NUGET\ZimerfeldTree\src'; $dll = 'C:\NUGET\ZimerfeldTree\src\GitExtensions.ZimerfeldTree\bin\Release\net9.0-windows\GitExtensions.Plugins.ZimerfeldTree.dll'; $newest = (Get-ChildItem $src -Recurse -Include '*.cs','*.csproj','*.nuspec' -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).LastWriteTime; $dllTime = if (Test-Path $dll) { (Get-Item $dll).LastWriteTime } else { [DateTime]::MinValue }; if ($newest -gt $dllTime) { & 'C:\NUGET\ZimerfeldTree\build.ps1' }
